evals.prompt: 방금 구현한 회원 카드 잠금 기능 (api-backoffice/src/items/users/cards/lock.controller.ts) 출시 가능한지 점검해줘. 유닛 테스트는 다 통과함.
evals.expected_output: Inventories the surface (route, service, related entities) before audit. Runs both backend track dimensions (validation, authz, concurrency, error handling, observability, ops) and any relevant frontend dimensions. Reports prioritized blockers/major/polish with probe + observation + suggested fix per finding.

evals.prompt: 이 React 컴포넌트가 happy path는 잘 되는데 production-ready 인지 검토해줘. src/widgets/credit/CreditList.tsx
evals.expected_output: Reads the component, identifies all states it handles vs the full state taxonomy (loading-initial, loading-refresh, success-empty, success-populated, error-recoverable, error-fatal, optimistic). Reports state coverage gaps + accessibility + responsive findings. Does not claim 'works fine' without explicit probes.
